original_image_tags: Aged, yellowish document page, showing text bleed-through from the reverse side. Visible stamps and faint, reversed typewritten text. Two hole-punch marks at the top.
At bottom center, a red stamp box containing:

elements.description: One red rectangular stamp at the bottom center with text 'RECEIVED', 'JUL 10 1953', and 'COAM - FEBRU'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions consistently identify a single red rectangular stamp at the bottom center and agree on the quoted text 'RECEIVED' and 'JUL 10 1953', with no contradictory claims about visual content.
